title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Orient Electric - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Orient Electric - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Orient Electric are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Orient Electric:
Orient Electric is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
